description_long: This sculpture features a multi-tiered, ornate stone base with a central pedestal supporting a dynamic, upward-reaching figure. The base is octagonal with layered steps, and at each corner, there are sculpted animal forms, possibly lions or similar creatures, flanking the pedestal. The central figure appears to be draped in flowing garments, with a sense of movement captured in the sculpted folds. The surface is predominantly a light stone color, with darker accents highlighting the animals and certain details. The overall design is classical, with a sense of grandeur and permanence, suggesting it is a commemorative or decorative monument. The craftsmanship and material suggest it is intended for a prominent public space.
description: A grand, multi-tiered stone sculpture with a central draped figure and animal forms at the base, featuring classical detailing and a sense of movement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central figure, two animal sculptures flanking the pedestal, and the layered octagonal base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the animal sculptures and the stepped base, with the draped figure partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the central figure and animals, showing the symmetry and depth of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other animal sculpture and the layered structure of the base.
attribute_subject_matter: classical draped figure with animal forms on a tiered base
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
